key_insight: MMAT frames mathematical research as a closed-loop multi-agent workflow, using LLM agents to bridge informal exploration and formal proof generation.
engineering_relevance: The tripartite Harness Architecture offers a modular pattern for building reliable agentic systems that separate control, execution, and augmentation in complex reasoning tasks.
method: Decouples the system into Control, Execution, and Augmentation planes.
Deploys three specialized agents: Knowledge Base Manager, Natural Language Prover, and Formal Language Prover.
Uses a closed loop to iteratively refine and certify proofs.
evidence_signal: In a two-month deployment on open problems across five math areas, the system solved 11 problems according to the abstract.
watch_item: Performance is reported on a limited problem set and over a fixed deployment period, so generalization and proof reliability still need careful validation.
paper_title: MechMath Agent Team: LLM Driven Agents for Mathematical Research
